content.cn_text: Customer：你好，我想在 Velleya 度过一个周末短假。你能给我介绍一些选择吗？
content.en_text: Customer: Hi, I'm interested in taking a weekend break in Velleya. Can you provide me with some options?

content.cn_text: Agent：当然，我非常推荐我们的度假套餐，每人价格是280。它包括
content.en_text: Agent: Of course, I highly recommend our holiday package, priced at 280 per person. It includes

content.cn_text: 住宿、餐食和一系列活动。
content.en_text: accommodation, meals, and a range of activities.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来很不错。住宿方面有什么？
content.en_text: Customer: That sounds great. What can I expect from the accommodation?

content.cn_text: Agent：我们为客户精心挑选了一家信誉良好的酒店。每个房间设施齐全，
content.en_text: Agent: We have carefully selected a reputable hotel for our clients. Each room is well-appointed

content.cn_text: 配有私人浴室、电视和其他设施。此外，你还可以欣赏到令人愉悦的
content.en_text: with a private bathroom, TV, and other amenities. Additionally, you'll enjoy a delightful

content.cn_text: 花园景观。
content.en_text: view of the garden from your room.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来很棒。酒店还有其他特色吗？
content.en_text: Customer: That sounds lovely. Are there any other unique features of the hotel?

content.cn_text: Agent：当然。酒店拥有一个私人海滩，距离仅1公里。那里是
content.en_text: Agent: Absolutely. The hotel boasts a private beach located just 1 kilometer away. It's the perfect

content.cn_text: 放松和晒太阳的理想地点。
content.en_text: place to unwind and soak up the sun.

content.cn_text: Customer：太棒了。套餐包括哪些活动？
content.en_text: Customer: That's fantastic. What activities are included in the package?

content.cn_text: Agent：你的假期从星期五酒店屋顶露台的晚餐开始，在那里你
content.en_text: Agent: Your holiday starts with a Friday dinner on the rooftop terrace of the hotel, where you

content.cn_text: 可以欣赏令人惊叹的日落。
content.en_text: can bask in the breathtaking sunset.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来很浪漫。还有其他安排吗？
content.en_text: Customer: That sounds romantic. Are there any other activities planned?

content.cn_text: Agent：当然。晚餐后，你有两个选择。你可以参加热闹的舞蹈活动，
content.en_text: Agent: Certainly. After dinner, you have two options. You can either join a lively dance session,

content.cn_text: 这在精力充沛的年轻人中很受欢迎，或者参加专家的讲座。
content.en_text: which is popular among energetic young people, or attend a talk by a specialist.

content.cn_text: Customer：我觉得第二个更好。我不确定自己是否有足够精力参加
content.en_text: Customer: I think the second one is better. I'm not sure if I'll have enough energy for the activities

content.cn_text: 第二天的活动。星期六上午有什么安排？
content.en_text: on the following day. What's planned for Saturday morning?

content.cn_text: Agent：上午，我们安排了由知识丰富的导游带领的私人博物馆之旅。
content.en_text: Agent: In the morning, we have a private tour to a museum with a knowledgeable guide. It's

content.cn_text: 这是沉浸体验当地文化的绝佳机会。
content.en_text: a fantastic opportunity to immerse yourself in the local culture.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来很有意思。星期六下午呢？
content.en_text: Customer: That sounds interesting. What about Saturday afternoon?

content.cn_text: Agent：其实，上午我们还会参观一个工作室，它以使用玻璃
content.en_text: Agent: Actually, in the morning, we also pay a visit to a studio, which is renowned for using glass

content.cn_text: 制作各种装饰品而闻名。这是一小时的行程。午餐后，下午，
content.en_text: to make an array of ornaments. It is a one-hour trip. Then after lunch, in the afternoon,

content.cn_text: 我们安排了乘坐大巴去看一场歌剧。这会是一次愉快的文化体验。
content.en_text: we've arranged a coach trip to watch an opera. It will be a delightful cultural experience.

content.cn_text: Customer：这个安排不错。星期天上午呢？
content.en_text: Customer: That's a nice addition. What about Sunday morning?

content.cn_text: Agent：你可以选择在附近悠闲散步，或者预订免费的按摩，
content.en_text: Agent: You have the option to take a leisurely walk nearby, or you can book a complimentary massage

content.cn_text: 放松身心。这是酒店的特色服务。
content.en_text: to relax and unwind. It's a service that the hotel specializes in.

content.cn_text: Customer：我一定会选这个。我妻子很喜欢。
content.en_text: Customer: I'll definitely do that. My wife loves them.

content.cn_text: Agent：很好的选择。星期天下午，我们安排了令人兴奋的登山行程，
content.en_text: Agent: Great choice. On Sunday afternoon, we have an exciting hill climbing trip

content.cn_text: 你将有机会骑驴，欣赏壮丽景色。
content.en_text: planned. You'll have the opportunity to ride a donkey and enjoy the breathtaking views.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来像一次冒险。星期天晚上有什么安排？
content.en_text: Customer: That sounds like an adventure, and what's planned for Sunday evening?

content.cn_text: Agent：星期天晚上，我们会在山顶的一家餐厅享用烧烤晚餐。
content.en_text: Agent: Sunday evening we'll have a barbecue dinner at a restaurant located at the top of the hill.

content.cn_text: 我们的特色菜是烤羊肉。这是必尝菜品。
content.en_text: Our speciality is grilled lamb. It's a must-try dish.

content.cn_text: Customer：听起来非常美味。我决定预订这个度假套餐。谢谢你
content.en_text: Customer: That sounds absolutely delicious. I'm convinced I'll book the holiday package. Thank you for

content.cn_text: 的帮助。 Agent：不客气。我相信你会在 Velleya 度过美好时光。让我
content.en_text: your assistance. Agent: You're welcome. I'm confident that you'll have an amazing time in Velleya. Let

content.cn_text: 来帮你办理预订。
content.en_text: me assist you with the booking process.

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

groups.desc: Complete the form below. Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: Each room has a view of the 1. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 Each room has a view of the ______。原文说 view of the garden，所以答案是 garden。

items.title: Access to a private 2. __________ (1 km)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 Access to a private ______ (1 km)。原文说 private beach located just 1 kilometer away，所以答案是 beach。

items.title: dinner on the 3. __________ terrace
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 Friday evening: dinner on the ______ terrace。原文说 rooftop terrace，所以答案是 rooftop。

items.title: dance or listen to a special 4. __________ after breakfast
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 dance or listen to a special ______。原文第二个选择是 attend a talk by a specialist，客人选择第二个，所以答案是 talk。

items.title: have a guided tour to a local 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 Saturday morning: have a guided tour to a local ______。原文说 guided/private tour to a museum，所以答案是 museum。

items.title: visit a studio famous for making 6. __________ ornaments
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 visit a studio famous for making ______ ornaments。原文说 using glass to make ornaments，所以答案是 glass。

items.title: Go to the 7. __________ by coach
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 Saturday afternoon: Go to the ______ by coach。原文说 coach trip to watch an opera，所以答案是 opera。

items.title: Book a free 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 Sunday morning: Book a free ______。原文说 book a complimentary massage，所以答案是 massage。walk 是另一个选项。

items.title: Climb a hill by taking a 9. __________ ride
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 Sunday afternoon: Climb a hill by taking a ______ ride。原文说 ride a donkey，所以答案是 donkey。

items.title: a barbecue dinner (including grilled 10. __________)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 barbecue dinner including grilled ______。原文说 speciality is grilled lamb，所以答案是 lamb。
